background: Phase 32 identified 125 guides with ~7 total impressions, 0 clicks

audit_findings.quality_observation: Guides linked from calculator pages (Related Guides section) appear to be substantial. The 125 zero-impression guides may be a mix of quality and thin content.
audit_findings.cannot_full_audit_remotely: Full guide-by-guide audit requires access to all published guide pages

reason: Phase 32 experiment is still running (Day 3/7). Premature noindexing would invalidate the experiment. Thin guides don't affect AdSense review because they're not in primary navigation — only linked as related content from calculator pages.
recommended_default: KEEP_AND_IMPROVE_TOP_10 — after Phase 32 Day 7 data confirms which guides have value. Remove zero-value guides from sitemap only if confirmed zero traffic and zero quality.
adsense_impact: LOW — guides not in primary nav, not prominent. Reviewer unlikely to encounter thin guides.
